title: Floral Vegan Jelly Bowl
description: A delicate, floral, and refreshing Korean-inspired dessert made with vegan jelly and garnished with edible flowers. Perfect for a light and fruity treat.

ingredients.name: Edible Flowers (such as violas or pansies)

instructions: 1. In a small bowl, mix together the gelatin-free jelly mix and water until well combined.
2. Add the vegan simple syrup to the jelly mixture and stir until dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture into a bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to set.
4. Once set, garnish with edible flowers if desired.
